tools.name: scan_website
tools.description: Run the free structural AI-readiness preview for a public website the user owns or is authorized to assess. Returns a score, grade, readiness pillars and the lowest suitable SYA package.

tools.name: explain_readiness_score
tools.description: Explain what an SYA structural readiness score means and the appropriate next step. This does not measure AI answer rankings, mentions, citations or traffic.

tools.name: list_packages
tools.description: List current SYA packages, localised USD/GBP/EUR prices, intended use and customer-controlled detail links.

tools.name: get_sample_report
tools.description: Return one of the limited public SYA sample report previews for SaaS, API, ecommerce or Web3 websites.

tools.name: get_package_link
tools.description: Return the public detail and pricing links for a selected SYA package. This does not create a checkout session or make a purchase.
